tools.name: get_revenue_report
tools.description: Retrieve total booked revenue for a given time period, broken down by business unit. Read-only reporting endpoint used for financial summaries.

parameters.name: business_unit
parameters.description: Filter to a single BU; omit for company-wide

tools.name: fetch_quarterly_earnings
tools.description: Fetch published quarterly earnings figures (revenue, net income, EPS) as reported to shareholders. Sourced from the closed/audited ledger.

tools.name: get_pnl_statement
tools.description: Generate a profit-and-loss statement showing income, cost of goods sold, operating expenses and net profit for a period.

tools.name: create_invoice
tools.description: [DEPRECATED — use create_invoice_v2] Create a customer invoice using the legacy flat line-item format. Kept alive only for the audit/reconciliation pipeline that still parses the v1 field layout.

tools.name: create_invoice_v2
tools.description: Create a customer invoice (current version). Supports structured line items with tax codes, multi-currency, and payment terms. This is the recommended tool for all new invoice creation.

tools.name: get_expense_summary
tools.description: Summarize categorized company expenses for a period.

tools.name: process_payment
tools.description: Charge a stored payment method and record the transaction. Mutating.

tools.name: get_budget_forecast
tools.description: Return the forward-looking budget forecast for a department.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send a plain-text or HTML email to one or more recipients. Body only; does NOT support file attachments.

tools.name: send_email_with_attachment
tools.description: Send an email that carries one or more file attachments (e.g. a chart image, PDF, or spreadsheet). Use this whenever a file must be delivered by email; plain send_email cannot attach files.

tools.name: send_slack_message
tools.description: Post a message to a Slack channel or direct message.

tools.name: send_sms
tools.description: Send an SMS text message to a phone number.

tools.name: post_teams_message
tools.description: Post a message to a Microsoft Teams channel.

tools.name: schedule_email
tools.description: Queue an email to be sent at a future timestamp. Body only, no attachments.

tools.name: generate_chart
tools.description: Render a chart image (PNG) from a supplied dataset or query result and return an asset id that can be attached or embedded.

tools.name: create_visualization
tools.description: Build an interactive visualization in the BI workspace from a dataset. Produces a dashboard tile, not a downloadable image file.

tools.name: run_sql_query
tools.description: Execute a read-only SQL query against the analytics warehouse and return rows. Results can be referenced by chart/export tools.

tools.name: export_dashboard
tools.description: Export an existing BI dashboard to a PDF snapshot.

tools.name: get_metric_timeseries
tools.description: Fetch a named business metric as a time series over a date range.

tools.name: get_employee_record
tools.description: Retrieve a full HR employee record including legal name, home address, national ID / SSN, compensation band and employment status. PII-scoped; requires HR permissions.

tools.name: lookup_employee
tools.description: Search the employee directory by name or department and return basic contact info (work email, title, manager). Non-PII directory view.

tools.name: request_time_off
tools.description: Submit a paid-time-off request for approval.

tools.name: get_payroll_info
tools.description: Retrieve an employee's payroll details (gross pay, deductions, net pay).

tools.name: submit_expense_reimbursement
tools.description: File an employee expense reimbursement claim.

tools.name: get_org_chart
tools.description: Return the reporting hierarchy under a given manager.

tools.name: get_user
tools.description: Fetch an application user account by user id. Returns account profile: display name, email, roles, status. The canonical user-account lookup.

tools.name: fetch_profile
tools.description: Fetch a user's public profile (avatar, bio, display name) by user id. Read-only presentation view; does NOT include roles or account status.

tools.name: lookup_member
tools.description: Look up a member of a workspace/org by id and return membership metadata (joined date, seat type, workspace roles).

tools.name: get_user_by_email
tools.description: Resolve a user account from an email address (the other lookups require a user id). Returns the same account profile as get_user.

tools.name: deactivate_user
tools.description: Disable a user account so they can no longer sign in. Reversible.

tools.name: create_ticket
tools.description: Open a general IT service-desk ticket (e.g. laptop request, access request). Routed to the IT support queue, not on-call engineering.

tools.name: open_incident
tools.description: Declare a production incident and page the on-call engineer. Use for outages / service degradation, NOT routine support requests.

tools.name: restart_service
tools.description: Restart a named backend service in a given environment.

tools.name: deploy_application
tools.description: Deploy a specified application version to an environment.

tools.name: get_service_health
tools.description: Return current health/uptime metrics for a service.

tools.name: rollback_deployment
tools.description: Roll a service back to its previous deployed version.

tools.name: scale_service
tools.description: Change the replica count for a service.

tools.name: get_customer
tools.description: Retrieve a CRM customer/account record (company, tier, owner, ARR).

tools.name: create_lead
tools.description: Create a new sales lead in the CRM.

tools.name: update_opportunity
tools.description: Update the stage or amount of a sales opportunity.

tools.name: get_sales_pipeline
tools.description: Summarize the sales pipeline by stage for a team or rep.

tools.name: log_call
tools.description: Log a sales call activity against a customer.

tools.name: create_calendar_event
tools.description: Create a calendar event on a single user's calendar (no invitee coordination).

tools.name: schedule_meeting
tools.description: Schedule a meeting across multiple attendees, resolving a common free slot and sending invites. Use when >1 attendee must be coordinated.

tools.name: find_available_slots
tools.description: Return open time slots common to a set of attendees.

tools.name: cancel_event
tools.description: Cancel a scheduled calendar event.

tools.name: upload_file
tools.description: Upload a file into the document management system and return a document id.

tools.name: get_document
tools.description: Fetch a document's metadata and content by document id.

tools.name: search_documents
tools.description: Full-text search across the document management system.

tools.name: share_document
tools.description: Grant a user access to a document and optionally notify them.

tools.name: convert_document
tools.description: Convert a document from one format to another (e.g. docx -> pdf).

tools.name: delete_file
tools.description: Permanently delete a document from the DMS.

tools.name: upload_to_s3
tools.description: Upload a raw object (bytes/blob) to an S3 bucket. Low-level object storage — NOT the document management system; no indexing or search.

tools.name: get_object
tools.description: Download a raw object from an S3 bucket by key.

tools.name: list_buckets
tools.description: List all S3 buckets in the account.

tools.name: send_campaign
tools.description: Send a marketing email campaign to a saved audience segment. This is a bulk marketing blast, NOT a transactional 1:1 email.

tools.name: get_campaign_metrics
tools.description: Retrieve open/click/conversion metrics for a marketing campaign.

tools.name: create_segment
tools.description: Create an audience segment from filter criteria.

tools.name: get_contract
tools.description: Retrieve a stored contract record and its status.

tools.name: request_signature
tools.description: Send a contract for e-signature to named signers.

tools.name: run_compliance_check
tools.description: Run an automated compliance policy check against a document or record.

tools.name: export_to_csv
tools.description: Export a query result or dataset to a downloadable CSV file and return an asset id.

tools.name: export_to_excel
tools.description: Export a query result or dataset to a formatted .xlsx workbook and return an asset id. Use when the user specifically needs Excel formatting/sheets.

tools.name: email_report
tools.description: Convenience wrapper that renders a dataset as an attached file and emails it in one step. Despite the name this lives in the DATA-EXPORT cluster; it only handles report delivery, it cannot send a free-form email.
